pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly sets DATA_FILE to this path and downloads the data here.
setup_task.sh downloads from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif and TIFF GDAL_METADATA confirms LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR from Google Earth Engine.
export_result.sh verifies the band name matches 'NDWI' (or contains NDWI).
export_result.sh verifies the band name matches 'FAI' (or contains FAI).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat 7 satellite imagery (LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR) downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data. The setup script explicitly downloads the file to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The evaluation scripts explicitly require the output files to be saved at /home/ga/snap_exports/algal_bloom_fai.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/algal_bloom_fai.tif. Additionally, the presence of specific band names 'NDWI' and 'FAI' are explicitly verified by the export script.
